description: Associate each vehicle with a named routing profile (car, truck, hgv, bike) so travel time and distance matrices use road network rules appropriate for that vehicle class.

actors.name: Routing Engine
actors.description: Computes travel time/distance matrices per profile

rules.one_matrix_per_profile: Each distinct profile in the fleet triggers one separate matrix retrieval from the routing engine.
rules.custom_matrix_bypasses_engine: When custom matrices are provided for a profile, no routing engine call is made.
rules.cost_matrix_conflict: A custom cost matrix and a per_hour or per_km vehicle cost cannot be used together; this combination is rejected.
rules.profiles_are_opaque: Profiles are treated as opaque strings; the optimizer does not interpret them — only the routing engine does.
rules.shared_profile_matrix: If all vehicles share the same profile, a single matrix fetch is made.
rules.speed_factor_scales_duration: speed_factor scales the duration matrix values after retrieval; distance values are unaffected.
rules.geometry_per_profile: When geometry output is requested, polyline-encoded route geometry is fetched per vehicle using the vehicle's profile.

values.description: Matrix not yet retrieved for this profile
Routing engine returned an error or unreachable location

given: all vehicle locations can be snapped to the road network for this profile
matrix_ready.result: Duration (and optionally distance) matrix stored for this profile; optimizer proceeds to solving.

given: custom duration matrix provided in problem input for this profile
matrix_from_custom_input.result: Custom matrix used directly; no routing engine call made.

given: routing engine returns error or one or more locations are unreachable
routing_engine_error.result: Solve aborted with routing error; caller should verify coordinates or supply a custom matrix.

given: speed_factor is set to a value other than 1.0 for a vehicle
speed_factor_applied.result: All travel durations for this vehicle scaled by speed_factor.

errors.message: Routing engine unreachable or returned unfound routes for one or more locations.
Custom cost matrix cannot be combined with per_hour or per_km vehicle costs.
speed_factor must be greater than 0 and at most 5.

events.name: routing.matrix.ready
events.description: Travel matrix successfully obtained for a routing profile

events.name: routing.matrix.failed
events.description: Could not retrieve matrix for the routing profile

events.name: routing.matrix.scaled
events.description: Duration matrix scaled by speed_factor for a vehicle
